title: Longest Substring Without Repeating Characters
coreIdea: Find the longest substring with all unique characters by expanding a window's right edge and shrinking its left edge whenever a duplicate character is encountered within the current window.
recognitionCues: asks for longest/shortest satisfying a condition
approach: Use a hashmap tracking the last seen index of each character. Expand right pointer; if the current character's last seen index is within the current window, move left pointer past that index. Update max length at each step.
